calc_dax: SWITCH(z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Year Month Num],202212,6,SWITCH(z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Num],3,5,6,5,9,5,12,5,4))
LOOKUPVALUE('Past Week'[SS%],'Past Week'[ITNBR],'Current'[ITEM],'Past Week'[NEW ETD WEEKEND],'Current'[NEW ETD WEEKEND])
CALCULATE(MAX('Vendor Split'[FORECAST PLANNER]),ALLEXCEPT('Vendor Split','Vendor Split'[Vendor],'Vendor Split'[item_number]))
LOOKUPVALUE('WANEK ITEM DRP BREAKDOWN'[MBUY CD],'WANEK ITEM DRP BREAKDOWN'[Item-Lvl1],'Vendor Split'[item_number])
LOOKUPVALUE('WANEK ITEM DRP BREAKDOWN'[DRP PLNR],'WANEK ITEM DRP BREAKDOWN'[Item-Lvl1],'Vendor Split'[item_number])
LOOKUPVALUE('WANEK ITEM DRP BREAKDOWN'[Wanek Item?],'WANEK ITEM DRP BREAKDOWN'[Item-Lvl1],'Vendor Split'[item_number])
IF('Vendor Split'[WANEK ITEM] = "Wanek/Millen",'Vendor Split'[WANEK FCST PLANNER],'Vendor Split'[FCST PLANNER11])
LOOKUPVALUE(z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Name],z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Indicator],z_FiscalCal[Rolling 12 Month Month Sort])

LOOKUPVALUE(z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Name],z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Indicator],calculate(min(z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Indicator]),ALLEXCEPT(z_FiscalCal,z_FiscalCal[Rolling Quarter Num]),z_FiscalCal[Rolling 12 Month Year]=0)) & "-" & LOOKUPVALUE(z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Name],z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Indicator],calculate(max(z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Indicator]),ALLEXCEPT(z_FiscalCal,z_FiscalCal[Rolling Quarter Num]),z_FiscalCal[Rolling 12 Month Year]=0))

IF(AND(LEFT(z_ProductDetails[Item SKU],1)="M",RIGHT(z_ProductDetails[Item SKU],2)="UN"),"Bedding Kit",IF(RIGHT(z_ProductDetails[Item SKU],2)="UN","UPH Kit",IF(RIGHT(z_ProductDetails[Item SKU],2)="SW","Swatch",IF(RIGHT(z_ProductDetails[Item SKU],5)="HIDES","HIDES",IF(RIGHT(z_ProductDetails[Item SKU],5)="VINYL","VINYL","")))))

abs(DATEDIFF(max('FC by Customer Group (in progress of discontinuing)'[SnapshotDate]),SWITCH(z_ProductDetails[Initial Invoice Month],date(1900,1,1),max('FC by Customer Group (in progress of discontinuing)'[SnapshotDate]),z_ProductDetails[Initial Invoice Month]),MONTH))

switch(sum(OrdHist[Order Amount]),0,z_ProductDetails[Arcadia FOB], CALCULate(divide(sum(OrdHist[Order Amount]),sum(OrdHist[Order Quantity])),z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Indicator]>=-3,z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Indicator]<0) )

switch(true(),and(z_ProductDetails[Collective Class] = "Occasional Tables",or(z_ProductDetails[AFI Sales Division]="Motion",z_ProductDetails[AFI Sales Division] ="Signature Motion")),"Motion Occasional",and(z_ProductDetails[Collective Class] = "Occasional Tables",or(z_ProductDetails[AFI Sales Division]="Stationary",z_ProductDetails[AFI Sales Division] ="Signature Stationary")),"Stationary Occasional",and(right(z_ProductDetails[Collective Class],3) = "RTA",or(z_ProductDetails[AFI Sales Division]="Motion",z_ProductDetails[AFI Sales Division] ="Signature Motion")),"Motion RTA",and(right(z_ProductDetails[Collective Class],3) = "RTA",z_ProductDetails[AFI Sales Division] ="Signature Accessory"),"Rta & Ashton York",z_ProductDetails[Collective Class] = "Ashton York","Rta & Ashton York",z_ProductDetails[Collective Class] = "Metal Beds","BEDROOM",z_ProductDetails[Collective Class])

divide(CALCULATE([Total Forecast],CustItWHAccy[ForecastPeriod]="90Days",z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Indicator]>=-6), calculate([Total Demand],CustItWHAccy[ForecastPeriod]="90Days",z_FiscalCal[Fiscal Month Indicator]>=-6))-1
SWITCH(TRUE(),z_ProductDetails[90D Sku Bias]>[Bias Threshold_CIW],"Over",z_ProductDetails[90D Sku Bias]<-[Bias Threshold_CIW],"Under","Even")
SWITCH(TRUE(),z_ProductDetails[90D Sku Bias]>[Bias Threshold],"Over",z_ProductDetails[90D Sku Bias]<-[Bias Threshold],"Under","Even")

DIVIDE(1,SWITCH(z_ProductDetails[General Description Code],700,LOOKUPVALUE(z_ProductDetails[Qty In Box],z_ProductDetails[Item SKU],LEFT(z_ProductDetails[Item SKU],LEN(z_ProductDetails[Item SKU])-1)),1))

SWITCH(z_ProductDetails[AFI Sales Category],"Bedding Latex","Foam","Sig. Bedding Memory Foam","Foam","Bedding Memory Foam","Foam","Sig. Bedding Inner Spring","Innerspring","Inner Spring Mattress","Innerspring","")

IF(GeneralTable[Type] = "Oversea Vendor", "TrueExcess", IF( GeneralTable[Type] = "Drop", "TrueExcess", IF(GeneralTable[Type] = "Consolidate", "TrueExcess", IF(GeneralTable[Type] = "Unexpected", "TrueExcess",  GeneralTable[Type]))))

SWITCH(TRUE(),z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="L","Disco",z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="E","Scrap",OR(z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="D",z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="R"),"Disco",z_ProductDetails[KitMarket]="Qtr 4 2024","Recent Launch",z_ProductDetails[KitMarket]="Qtr 1 2025","Recent Launch",z_ProductDetails[KitMarket]="Qtr 2 2025","Recent Launch",z_ProductDetails[KitMarket]="Qtr 3 2025","Recent Launch",z_ProductDetails[KitMarket]="Qtr 4 2025","Recent Launch",OR(z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="F",z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="P"),"PlanDrop",AND(z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="",OR(z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="",z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="W")),"Current","n/a")

SWITCH(TRUE(),OR(z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="D",z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="R"),"PLANNED/DROPS",OR(z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="F",z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="P"),"PLANNED/DROPS",OR(z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="L",z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="E"),"PLANNED/DROPS",z_ProductDetails[Market Introduced At]="QTR 4 2024","RECENT LAUNCH",z_ProductDetails[Market Introduced At]="QTR 1 2025","RECENT LAUNCH",z_ProductDetails[Market Introduced At]="QTR 2 2025","RECENT LAUNCH",z_ProductDetails[Market Introduced At]="QTR 3 2025","RECENT LAUNCH",z_ProductDetails[Market Introduced At]="QTR 4 2025","RECENT LAUNCH",z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="N","RECENT LAUNCH",AND(z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="",z_ProductDetails[Future Status]=""),"CURRENT",AND(z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="",z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="W"),"CURRENT","n/a")
LOOKUPVALUE(z_KitMkt[Kit - Mkt Intro At],z_KitMkt[Item SKU],z_ProductDetails[Item SKU])

SWITCH(TRUE(),OR(z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="D",z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="R"),"4",OR(z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="F",z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="P"),"4",OR(z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="L",z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="E"),"4",z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="N","1",NOT(ISBLANK(z_ProductDetails[Market Begin Date]))&&z_ProductDetails[Market Begin Date]>EDATE(TODAY(),-6),"1",(z_ProductDetails[Market Begin Date]<=EDATE(TODAY(),-6)&&z_ProductDetails[Market Begin Date]>EDATE(TODAY(),-18)),"2",AND(z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="",z_ProductDetails[Future Status]=""),"3",AND(z_ProductDetails[AFI Item Status]="",z_ProductDetails[Future Status]="W"),"3","5")

SWITCH(TRUE(),z_CustomerMaster_AFI[Account And ShipTo Number]="AFICONS",TRUE(),z_CustomerMaster_AFI[Account And ShipTo Number]="ECOMM",TRUE(),z_CustomerMaster_AFI[Account And ShipTo Number]="HSENT",TRUE(),z_CustomerMaster_AFI[Account And ShipTo Number]="HSLIC",TRUE(),z_CustomerMaster_AFI[Account And ShipTo Number]="INT",TRUE(),z_CustomerMaster_AFI[Account And ShipTo Number]="MASSRENT",TRUE(),z_CustomerMaster_AFI[Account And ShipTo Number]="NFM",TRUE(),z_CustomerMaster_AFI[Account And ShipTo Number]="RHCUST",TRUE(),ISNUMBER(CALCULATE(SUM(Actuals[Qty]))),TRUE(),FALSE())

DIVIDE(1,SWITCH(z_ProductDetails[General Description Code],700,LOOKUPVALUE(z_ProductDetails[Qty In Box],z_ProductDetails[Item SKU],LEFT(z_ProductDetails[Item SKU],LEN(z_ProductDetails[Item SKU])-1)),1))
